summary: Applied two surgical seam edits: diversified the opening sentence construction while preserving arrival details, and tightened the closing handoff to chapter 15 by anchoring Eli's next shift to Dryer Three.
edits: Rewrote the first opening sentence to remove the "by the time" scaffold while keeping the same bus-arrival information and tone.
Adjusted the final sentence to explicitly bridge into the next chapter's laundry-floor entry point at Dryer Three.
